metadata.name: Handle a Claim with Disputing Beneficiaries (Interpleader)

description: Two beneficiaries of a life insurance policy are disputing who should receive the proceeds.

nodes.task_description: Receive notice that the beneficiaries are disputing the claim.

expected_outcome.expected: The claims examiner is notified of the dispute.

nodes.task_description: Notify the legal department of the dispute.

expected_outcome.expected: The examiner escalates the case to the company's legal team.

nodes.task_description: Following legal advice, file an interpleader action, depositing the policy proceeds with the court and allowing the court to decide the rightful recipient.

expected_outcome.expected: The company pays the funds to the court, removing itself from the dispute between the beneficiaries.
